name: career-ops-india
description: AI-powered job search pipeline for the Indian market. Works with Claude Code and Gemini CLI.

scripts.setup:
node scripts/doctor.mjs && echo '
Setup complete. Run: npm run scan'
scripts.scan:all: node scripts/scan.mjs && node scripts/linkedin.mjs && node scripts/instahyre.mjs && node scripts/cutshort.mjs && node scripts/wellfound.mjs
scripts.scan:all:full: node scripts/scan.mjs && node scripts/linkedin.mjs && node scripts/instahyre.mjs && node scripts/cutshort.mjs && node scripts/wellfound.mjs && python scrapers/naukri_stealth.py

author: Anoj S K <https://github.com/AnojSKunte>
